name: Class
description: Implementation of the 'Class' model. Represents a single class instance. The class meets at the start time, goes until the end time.

ClassScheduleId.description: The ID used to retrieve the class schedule for the desired class.

Resource.description: Contains information about a resource, such as a room, assigned to a class.

MaxCapacity.description: The maximum number of clients allowed in the class.

WebCapacity.description: The maximum number of clients allowed to sign up online for the class.

TotalBooked.description: The total number of clients booked in the class.

TotalSignedIn.description: The total number of clients signed into the class.

TotalBookedWaitlist.description: The total number of booked clients on the waiting list for the class.

WebBooked.description: The total number of clients who signed up online for the class.

SemesterId.description: The ID of the semester that the class is a part of, if any.

IsCanceled.description:
When `true`, indicates that the class has been cancelled.
When `false`, indicates that the class has not been cancelled.

Substitute.description:
When `true`, indicates that the class is being taught by a substitute teacher.
When `false`, indicates that the class is being taught by its regular teacher.

Active.description:
When `true`, indicates that the class is shown to clients when in consumer mode.
When `false`, indicates that the class is not shown to clients when in consumer mode.

IsWaitlistAvailable.description:
When `true`, indicates that the clients can be placed on a waiting list for the class.
When `false`, indicates that the clients cannot be placed on a waiting list for the class.

IsEnrolled.description:
When `true`, indicates that the client with the given `ClientId` is enrolled in this class.
When `false`, indicates that the client with the given `ClientId` is not enrolled in this class.

HideCancel.description:
When `true`, indicates that this class is hidden when cancelled.
When `false`, indicates that this class is not hidden when cancelled.

Id.description: The unique identifier for the class.

IsAvailable.description:
When `true`, indicates that the client with the given client ID can book this class.
When `false`, indicates that the client with the given client ID cannot book this class.

StartDateTime.description: The time this class is scheduled to start.

EndDateTime.description: The time this class is scheduled to end.

LastModifiedDateTime.description: The last time this class was modified.

ClassDescription.description: Contains information that defines the class.

Staff.description: Contains information about the staff member.

BookingWindow.description: Contains information about the window for booking.

VirtualStreamLink.description: The link to the Mindbody-hosted live stream for the class. This is `null` when no live stream is configured for the class.

WaitListSize.description: The maximum number allowed on the waiting list for the class.

ClassNotes.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.
